title: Instant Village Building
description: Build your village in a second!
body:
This is originally for modpack [AnimateCraft: Lankeren](https://modrinth.com/modpack/animatecraft-lankeren). If you like this content, I'm sure you'll like that modpack, too. Welcome to check it out!
---

<details>
<summary>中文简介</summary>

还在一砖一瓦扩建村庄吗？用这个模组来轻松生成你的村庄建筑！（目前仅在平原生物群落中可用）

向二级牧师购买拼图方块，用主手拿着它，然后按潜行键来将它放置在脚下（这是因为生存模式下玩家不能直接放置拼图方块），然后在上面丢一个工作站点站物品来生成相应的建筑。丢一颗绿宝石会生成一座小民宅。

你甚至可以生成整个村庄！通过合成四个拼图方块可以获得一个结构方块。使用相同的方式放置结构方块，然后在上面丢下一个金钟，一个全新的村庄将立即生成。 

</details>

Build your village buildings easily! **(currently only available in plains biome)** 

by buying the jigsaw block from lv.2 cleric, **Hold it in main hand and sneak** to **place it under your feet** *(Players in survival mode cannot place jigsaw directly)* , then **drop** a **station block** on it to generate the corresponding building. Dropping a emerald will generate you a small house.

You can even generate **a whole village**!
**By crafting four jigsaw together, you will gain a structure block**. Use the same way to place the structure block, and then drop a bell on the structure block. Boom! A whole new village will generate immediately.
